languages.text: "Не извольте беспокоиться, у меня готов план. На все про все уйдет с полчаса, после чего встречаемся на условленном месте. Слово даю, буду ждать". {n}Яруб заметно оживляется в предвкушении.{/n}

"Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Не извольте беспокоиться, у меня готов план. На все про все уйдет с полчаса, после чего встречаемся на условленном месте. Слово даю, буду ждать". {n}Яруб заметно оживляется в предвкушении.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Not to worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}

"Not to worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}

"Not to worry, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}

languages.text: «No se preocupe, mi{mf|lord|lady}: tengo un plan. Lo haré en treinta minutos y después nos reuniremos donde hemos acordado. Allí estaré, se lo prometo». {n}Jarub se anima, entusiasmado ante la idea.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No se preocupe, mi{mf|lord|lady}: tengo un plan. Lo haré en treinta minutos y después nos reuniremos donde hemos acordado. Allí estaré, se lo prometo». {n}Jarub se anima, entusiasmado ante la idea.{/n}

languages.text: “别担心，大人，我有主意。三十分钟内搞定，然后在约定好的地方碰面。我一定到，您放心。”{n}雅鲁布明显兴奋起来，期待感溢于言表。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “别担心，大人，我有主意。三十分钟内搞定，然后在约定好的地方碰面。我一定到，您放心。”{n}雅鲁布明显兴奋起来，期待感溢于言表。{/n}

languages.text: « Rassurez-vous, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}, j'ai un plan. C'est l'affaire de trente minutes tout au plus, après quoi on se retrouvera à l'endroit convenu. J'y serai sans faute, vous avez ma parole. » {n}Jarub se redresse, visiblement impatient d'en finir.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Rassurez-vous, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}, j'ai un plan. C'est l'affaire de trente minutes tout au plus, après quoi on se retrouvera à l'endroit convenu. J'y serai sans faute, vous avez ma parole. » {n}Jarub se redresse, visiblement impatient d'en finir.{/n}

languages.text: "Endişelenmeyin {mf|lordum|leydim}, bir planım var. Otuz dakikada girip çıkacağım, sonra anlaştığımız yerde buluşacağız. Orada olacağım, söz veriyorum." {n}Jarub, hevesli bir beklentiyle gözle görülür şekilde can buluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Endişelenmeyin {mf|lordum|leydim}, bir planım var. Otuz dakikada girip çıkacağım, sonra anlaştığımız yerde buluşacağız. Orada olacağım, söz veriyorum." {n}Jarub, hevesli bir beklentiyle gözle görülür şekilde can buluyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Keine Sorge, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}, ich habe einen Plan. Ich ziehe das Ganze in dreißig Minuten durch und treffe Euch dann am vereinbarten Ort. Ich werde dort sein. Ihr habt mein Wort." {n}Jarub ist die Vorfreude sichtlich anzumerken.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Keine Sorge, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}, ich habe einen Plan. Ich ziehe das Ganze in dreißig Minuten durch und treffe Euch dann am vereinbarten Ort. Ich werde dort sein. Ihr habt mein Wort." {n}Jarub ist die Vorfreude sichtlich anzumerken.{/n}

languages.text: 「ご安心ください、私の{mf|殿|殿}|様、私は計画を立てています。30分で出入りし、その後、約束の場所で会います。私はそこにいるでしょう、私の言葉に耳を傾けてください。」{n}ジャラブは期待に胸を躍らせ、明らかに元気になりました。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Not to worry, my {mf|lord|lady}, I have a plan. I'll be in and out in thirty minutes, and then we'll meet at the agreed place. I'll be there, you have my word." {n}Jarub perks up noticeably in eager anticipation.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ご安心ください、私の{mf|殿|殿}|様、私は計画を立てています。30分で出入りし、その後、約束の場所で会います。私はそこにいるでしょう、私の言葉に耳を傾けてください。」{n}ジャラブは期待に胸を躍らせ、明らかに元気になりました。{/n}
